---
title: "Upper arm movement_RULA"
---

```{r}
# Set up workspace
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
rm(list=ls())
set.seed(42)
```


## load library
```{r cars}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(Metrics)
library(stats)
library(ggplot2)
library(blandr)
library(openxlsx)
```


## Load both shoulder flexion
Load excel sheet
```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
df <- read_excel("D:/next.Hessenbox/Human-technology interaction/Motion tracking accuracy comparison/Data_Zenodo/Shoulder_flexion_L+R.xlsx")
```


## Calculate both left and right shoulder flexion based on RULA
```{r}
classify_level <- function(x) {
  case_when(
    x <= 20 ~ 1,
    x > 20 & x <= 45 ~ 2,
    x > 45 & x <= 90 ~ 3,
    x > 90 ~ 4
  )
}

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Kinect_level = classify_level(Kinect),
    Captiv_level = classify_level(Captiv),
    Angle_level  = classify_level(Angle_scale)
  )

calc_distribution <- function(level_col) {
  total <- length(level_col)
  tab <- table(level_col)
  perc <- round(100 * tab / total, 2)
  data.frame(
    Level = names(tab),
    Count = as.vector(tab),
    Percentage = as.vector(perc)
  )
}

kinect_dist <- calc_distribution(df$Kinect_level)
captiv_dist <- calc_distribution(df$Captiv_level)
angle_dist  <- calc_distribution(df$Angle_level)

print(kinect_dist)
print(captiv_dist)
print(angle_dist)
```


## Binary RULA classification: low risk vs medium-high risk
## Low risk = RULA Levels 1–2
## Medium-high risk = RULA Levels 3–4
```{r}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Angle_risk_binary  = ifelse(Angle_level %in% c(3, 4), "Medium-high risk", "Low risk"),
    Kinect_risk_binary = ifelse(Kinect_level %in% c(3, 4), "Medium-high risk", "Low risk"),
    Captiv_risk_binary = ifelse(Captiv_level %in% c(3, 4), "Medium-high risk", "Low risk")
  )

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Angle_risk_binary  = factor(Angle_risk_binary, levels = c("Medium-high risk", "Low risk")),
    Kinect_risk_binary = factor(Kinect_risk_binary, levels = c("Medium-high risk", "Low risk")),
    Captiv_risk_binary = factor(Captiv_risk_binary, levels = c("Medium-high risk", "Low risk"))
  )


## Kinect vs angle-scale benchmark
tab_kinect <- table(
  Benchmark = df$Angle_risk_binary,
  Kinect = df$Kinect_risk_binary
)

print(tab_kinect)

mcnemar_kinect <- mcnemar.test(tab_kinect, correct = TRUE)
print(mcnemar_kinect)

b_kinect <- tab_kinect["Medium-high risk", "Low risk"]
c_kinect <- tab_kinect["Low risk", "Medium-high risk"]

exact_mcnemar_kinect <- binom.test(
  x = b_kinect,
  n = b_kinect + c_kinect,
  p = 0.5,
  alternative = "two.sided"
)

print(exact_mcnemar_kinect)

## Captiv vs angle-scale benchmark
tab_captiv <- table(
  Benchmark = df$Angle_risk_binary,
  Captiv = df$Captiv_risk_binary
)

print(tab_captiv)

mcnemar_captiv <- mcnemar.test(tab_captiv, correct = TRUE)
print(mcnemar_captiv)

b_captiv <- tab_captiv["Medium-high risk", "Low risk"]
c_captiv <- tab_captiv["Low risk", "Medium-high risk"]

exact_mcnemar_captiv <- binom.test(
  x = b_captiv,
  n = b_captiv + c_captiv,
  p = 0.5,
  alternative = "two.sided"
)

print(exact_mcnemar_captiv)
```


## Summary table for binary RULA risk classification
```{r}
calc_binary_risk_summary <- function(tab, device_name) {
  
  TP <- tab["Medium-high risk", "Medium-high risk"]
  FN <- tab["Medium-high risk", "Low risk"]
  FP <- tab["Low risk", "Medium-high risk"]
  TN <- tab["Low risk", "Low risk"]
  
  sensitivity <- TP / (TP + FN)
  specificity <- TN / (TN + FP)
  false_negative_rate <- FN / (TP + FN)
  false_positive_rate <- FP / (TN + FP)
  accuracy <- (TP + TN) / (TP + FN + FP + TN)
  
  exact_test <- binom.test(
    x = FN,
    n = FN + FP,
    p = 0.5,
    alternative = "two.sided"
  )
  
  data.frame(
    Device = device_name,
    True_positive = TP,
    False_negative = FN,
    False_positive = FP,
    True_negative = TN,
    Accuracy = round(accuracy, 3),
    Sensitivity = round(sensitivity, 3),
    Specificity = round(specificity, 3),
    False_negative_rate = round(false_negative_rate, 3),
    False_positive_rate = round(false_positive_rate, 3),
    Exact_McNemar_p = round(exact_test$p.value, 4)
  )
}

summary_kinect <- calc_binary_risk_summary(tab_kinect, "Azure Kinect")
summary_captiv <- calc_binary_risk_summary(tab_captiv, "Captiv")

binary_risk_summary <- bind_rows(summary_kinect, summary_captiv)

print(binary_risk_summary)
```
